Title: Enhances protections for child performer trust accounts
Summary: Enhances protections for child performer trust accounts; establishes how much gross earnings shall be set aside for such child performer.
LawCode: Amd §7-7.1, EPT L; amd §151, Lab L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the estates, powers and trusts law and the labor law, in relation to child performer protections
